requirements.notes: Pressure rating should exceed max simulated tank pressure with margin.

Volume exceeds 50 L minimum but fluid and cryogenic requirements are not met.

candidates.productName: Stainless Steel 1-Piece 40 Series Ball Valve, 12 Cv, 1/2 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting, SC-11
candidates.notes: Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11). Body Material: 316 Stainless Steel. Ball/Stem Material: Stainless Steel. Packing Material: PTFE. Lubricant: Nonhydrocarbon lubricants. Room Temperature Pressure Rating: 2500 PSIG @ 100°F / 172 BAR @ 37°C. Flow Pattern: 2-Way, Shutoff, Straight. Orifice: 0.406 in / 10.3 mm. Low Emissions Certified: Yes. Service Class: General. Price requires login to view. Oxygen-clean determination based on SC-11 Special Cleaning and Packaging designation and nonhydrocarbon lubricants; page does not explicitly state 'oxygen clean' but SC-11 is Swagelok's oxygen cleaning process designation.

candidates.productName: Bronze Body Solenoid On/Off Valve, for Cryogenic Liquids, 120V AC, 1/2 NPT, 110 Maximum PSI
candidates.notes: 110 psi @ -350°F rating converts to ~758,423 Pa. Page states valves are 'cleaned and bagged for high-purity applications' and explicitly listed for Liquid Oxygen use. Zero pressure drop valve type; no minimum pressure drop required. Fail closed solenoid, 120V AC, 1/2 NPT female threaded, bronze body, glass-filled PTFE seals/seat, temperature range -350°F to 400°F. Does not meet the 2,000,000 Pa (290 psi) pressure rating requirement.
